title: circaea lalashanensis
intro: Circaea lalashanensis is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family (Onagraceae), native to Taiwan. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Circaea lalashanensis are believed to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being.
